tree.setup: Your friend shows you photos from their recent trip to Chengdu.
tree.setup_zh: 你的朋友给你看他们最近去成都旅游的照片。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你看，这是我上个月去成都拍的照片。
turns.text_pinyin: nǐ kàn, zhè shì wǒ shàng ge yuè qù chéngdū pāi de zhàopiàn.
turns.text_en: Look, these are photos I took in Chengdu last month.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: React to the photos and ask about their trip.

options.text_zh: 好主意！我们明天下午在图书馆见吧？
options.text_pinyin: hǎo zhǔyi! wǒmen míngtiān xiàwǔ zài túshūguǎn jiàn ba?
options.text_en: Good idea! Shall we meet at the library tomorrow afternoon?
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to react to the photos and ask about their trip, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 我去买吧，附近有没有超市？
options.text_pinyin: wǒ qù mǎi ba, fùjìn yǒu méiyǒu chāoshì?
options.text_en: I'll go buy them. Is there a supermarket nearby?
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to react to the photos and ask about their trip, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 哇，成都看起来很漂亮！你去了哪些地方？
options.text_pinyin: wā, chéngdū kàn qǐlai hěn piàoliang! nǐ qù le nǎxiē dìfang?
options.text_en: Wow, Chengdu looks beautiful! What places did you visit?
options.feedback: Enthusiastic and curious — complimenting the photos and asking for details is great conversation.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 我去看了大熊猫，还吃了很多好吃的火锅！
turns.text_pinyin: wǒ qù kàn le dà xióngmāo, hái chī le hěn duō hǎochī de huǒguō!
turns.text_en: I went to see the giant pandas, and also ate lots of delicious hotpot!

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Express interest and say you also want to go someday.

options.text_pinyin: tài guì le. sānshí kuài kěyǐ ma?
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to express interest and say you also want to go someday, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 我一直想去看大熊猫！火锅辣不辣？
options.text_pinyin: wǒ yīzhí xiǎng qù kàn dà xióngmāo! huǒguō là bú là?
options.text_en: I've always wanted to see the pandas! Was the hotpot spicy?
options.feedback: Shows genuine excitement and asks a specific follow-up — makes your friend feel heard.
Off-topic — you were asked to express interest and say you also want to go someday, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

tree.cultural_note: Chengdu (成都), the capital of Sichuan province, is famous for three things: giant pandas, Sichuan hotpot, and a relaxed lifestyle. When Chinese friends share travel photos, they expect animated reactions — saying 好漂亮 or 好羡慕 (so jealous!) shows you're engaged. Understating your reaction can come across as uninterested.
